name: ticket-plugin
description: Marketplace hosting the `ticket-plugin` plugin: per-ticket tracking files for Linear / JIRA tickets, with start/pause/update/archive slash commands.

plugins.name: ticket-plugin
plugins.description: Per-ticket tracking for Linear / JIRA tickets, with an end-to-end ship-it command. Slash commands /ticket-plugin:start, /ticket-plugin:pause, /ticket-plugin:update, /ticket-plugin:archive, and /ticket-plugin:merge keep a durable per-ticket plan + findings + progress log outside the repo, sync the plan back to the ticket on close, and (via :merge) wrap merge-PR + transition-to-Done + archive in one confirmed step.
